revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.comment: Bot: sync with enwiki
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Domains of Chūbu | title = [[Han system|Domains]] of [[Chūbu region|Chūbu]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | image = | listclass = hlist
| group1 = | list1 = * [[Numazu Domain|Numazu]] * [[Ojima Domain|Ojima]] * [[Sunpu Domain|Suruga-Fuchū]] * [[Tanaka Domain|Tanaka]] * [[Sagara Domain|Sagara]] * [[Kakegawa Domain|Kakegawa]] * [[Yokosuka Domain|Yokosuka]] * [[Hamamatsu Domain|Hamamatsu]] * [[Horie Domain|Horie]] * [[Yoshida Domain|Mikawa-Yoshida]] * [[Tahara Domain|Tahara]] * [[Okazaki Domain|Okazaki]] * [[Nishi-Ōhira Domain|Nishi-Ōhira]] * [[Koromo Domain|Koromo]] * [[Kariya Domain|Kariya]] * [[Nishibata Domain|Nishibata]] * [[Nishio Domain|Nishio]] * [[Inuyama Domain|Inuyama]] * [[Owari Domain|Owari]] * [[Naegi Domain|Naegi]] * [[Iwamura Domain|Iwamura]] * [[Gujō Domain|Gujō]] * [[Takatomi Domain|Takatomi]] * [[Kanō Domain|Kanō]] * [[Ōgaki Domain|Ōgaki]] * [[Ōgaki-Shinden Domain|Ōgaki-Shinden]] * [[Imao Domain|Imao]] * [[Takasu Domain|Takasu]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
